examples.title: Algorithm: Perceptron Learning
examples.code:
ALGORITHM PerceptronLearning
INPUT: training data, learning rate η
OUTPUT: weights w, bias b

BEGIN
 INITIALIZE weights w, bias b to small random values or zeros
 FOR EACH training example (x, desired_output)
 COMPUTE output: y = f(w·x + b)
 IF prediction is incorrect
 UPDATE weights: w = w + η*y*x
 UPDATE bias: b = b + η*y
 REPEAT until all examples are correctly classified or maximum iterations reached
END
examples.explanation: The perceptron learning algorithm iteratively updates weights to minimize classification errors.

examples.title: Python: Perceptron Implementation
examples.explanation: This Python implementation includes the Perceptron class with fit and predict methods.
